ABOUT US

WHO ARE WE ?

Petsverse™ has a clear and simple goal – to introduce pets into the Metaverse, and unite crypto enthusiasts with pet lovers in a world filled with pet-related games, adventures, and unique experiences.

Petsverse™ is more than just a gateway to bring our pets into the Metaverse; it is also a way to support ideas that share our vision.

SUPPORTED BLOCKCHAINS

PetsVerse™

Dashboard

The ultimate dashboard for our Petsverse™ ecosystem, where users will stake, participate in governance voting, and so much more.

Coming soon

UTILITIES

ECOSYSTEM

Each utility contributes toward maintaining a healthy ecosystem, ensuring constant forward progress.

P2E GAMES

We intend to create various play2earn games and collaborate with other p2e projects until our Metaverse is complete, at which point we will integrate both our own, and our incubated games into the Petsverse™

GOVERNANCE & STAKE

We want to achieve our goals as a community, and we believe it's important that our investors play a vital role in the decisions we make to ensure the best possible life for our virtual pets, as well as the longevity of the project. To do this, investors will use the dashboard to vote on decisions, with voting power determined by your current holding.

INCUBATOR

A portion of the profits generated by our ecosystem goes toward collaborations and the incubation of incubation or early ideas that share our vision. In addition, we assist them in developing and integrating their game into our upcoming Metaverse.

METAVERSE

Our ultimate goal is to incorporate all of our own, as well as incubated games into our upcoming Metaverse. Once complete, this is the world where all our digital pets, customized to our liking, will live happily, fur-ever, joining us for adventures, games, and everything in between.

OUR VISION

Upcoming Plans

Summon your pet companion from the Petsverse™ in one of our games.

PetStep
EXPECTED RELEASE: Q4 2022

Petstep's Game-Fi and Play2earn elements make it fun to bring your virtual pet from the Petsverse into the app, where you can play games, take it on walks, and earn in-game tokens.

We are the first project to use move-to-earn technology to allow pet owners to use their virtual pets as a rewarding and entertaining way to stay active while spending time with their lifelong friends. Why not use the opportunity to walk your real-world pet while earning crypto with your virtual companion?

Coming soon
MONSTERPETS
EXPECTED RELEASE: Q2 2023

Create a city for your monster pets, fill it with habitats, and start breeding adorable monster pets.

Players will be able to take care of their monster pets and build habitats.If taken care of and farmed, your pets will have enough food as they mature into majestic monsters that dwell in the Petsverse, a world full of exciting adventures and fierce fights where you can earn rewards for your collection and the success of your chosen strategy.

Under development
THE PETSVERSE™
EXPECTED RELEASE Q1 2024

You can customize your virtual pet and give it a home in the fascinating Petsverse™ metaverse. Here our digital pets have long fulfilling lives full with different adventures and games to make it fun for both their pets and the owners.

We're working on a 3D scanner that will allow pet owners to scan their real pets into our Metaverse using wireframe technology, then customize them with whatever unique characteristics you feel will make it stand out or make it look like your own pet. The scanner also ensures it can communicate with our games, and the entire Metaverse.

Concept phase

Incubator

Collaborations

Let us incubate your game and see how seamlessly it may fit into our metaverse.

A portion of the funds raised for development and collaborative purposes will be used to incubate projects with a similar goal so that we can incorporate them into our open metaverse.

Apply now

Our friends in the crypto world

Partners & Backers

A project can never succeed alone
